data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of an audit trail with timestamp and IP, as specified in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or API reads that confirm the existence of such an audit trail. The absence of this critical functionality indicates a gap in the requirement, as there is no evidence supporting that the system captures audit events with the necessary details.
gaps: No evidence of an audit trail capturing timestamps and IP addresses.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
